Package global.thalion.ttio.protocols

Interface CVAnnotatable

All Known Implementing Classes:
FreeInductionDecay, SignalArray
public interface CVAnnotatable
Objects implementing CVAnnotatable can be tagged with controlled-vocabulary parameters from any ontology (PSI-MS, nmrCV, CHEBI, BFO, ...). This is the primary extensibility mechanism in TTI-O: the schema stays minimal while semantic richness lives in curated external ontologies.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOCVAnnotatable, Python ttio.protocols.CVAnnotatable.

API status: Stable (conformers may change; the protocol is frozen for v0.6).

Since:
0.6

  • Method Details

    • addCvParam

      void addCvParam(CVParam param)
      Attach a CVParam to this object.
      Parameters:
      param - the CV parameter to attach; must not be null

    • removeCvParam

      void removeCvParam(CVParam param)
      Detach a previously-attached CVParam. No-op if absent.
      Parameters:
      param - the CV parameter to remove

    • allCvParams

      List<CVParam> allCvParams()
      Returns:
      every attached CVParam in insertion order.

    • cvParamsForAccession

      List<CVParam> cvParamsForAccession(String accession)
      Parameters:
      accession - the ontology accession string (e.g. MS:1000514)
      Returns:
      every attached CVParam whose accession matches

    • cvParamsForOntologyRef

      List<CVParam> cvParamsForOntologyRef(String ontologyRef)
      Parameters:
      ontologyRef - the ontology reference prefix (e.g. MS)
      Returns:
      every attached CVParam whose ontologyRef matches

    • hasCvParamWithAccession

      boolean hasCvParamWithAccession(String accession)
      Parameters:
      accession - the ontology accession string to test
      Returns:
      true iff at least one attached CVParam matches
